description: Update the ticket resale spreadsheet to accurately calculate profit. Include columns for platform fees, purchase fees, and payment processing fees, and ensure the profit formula accounts for all these costs.

natural_language.prompt: You have a ticket resale tracking spreadsheet, but the profit calculations are wrong because they don't account for platform fees. Add columns for Purchase Fee (10% for StubHub), Selling Fee (15% for StubHub, 12% for Ticketmaster), and Payment Processing Fee (2.9% for platform sales). Then fix the profit formula to subtract all fees. Finally, highlight negative profits in red using conditional formatting.
